topic: keyboard shortcuts that 10x your coding speed

script_segments.text: keyboard shortcuts that 10x your coding speed debate in 7 seconds.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing keyboard shortcuts that 10x your coding speed. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: The answer is obvious. Or is it? Comment which side you're on.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: The honest truth about keyboard shortcuts that 10x your coding speed that nobody is telling you.
